message:
fix(server): reactor creation, runtime threading, HTTP listener, and PTY geometry validation

Address CPU spin and degenerate terminal handling in server startup:

- Create explicit reactor for async I/O initialization
- Use single-threaded worker to prevent idle CPU spin in local/TUI
  sessions where multi-threaded runtime is unnecessary
- Move HTTP listener spawning to a dedicated task to avoid fallback
  wake loops that burn CPU on quiet connections
- Detect degenerate PTY geometry (0x0 terminal size) and trigger
  headless fallback mode instead of rendering garbage
- Skip startup dashboard rendering on invalid terminal dimensions

These changes significantly reduce idle CPU usage for local MCP server
instances and gracefully handle headless/containerized environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
